component.name: OpenSSH GUI
component.summary: A graphical user interface for OpenSSH key management

description.p: An intuitive graphical interface for OpenSSH, designed for Windows, Linux, and Mac users. Built entirely in C#, this open-source tool simplifies managing SSH connections, keys, and configurations.

Whether you're a network administrator, developer, or a casual user, OpenSSH-GUI eliminates the complexity of command-line SSH interactions while retaining the power of OpenSSH. Explore a streamlined experience for secure remote access and system management.
Empower your workflow today with OpenSSH-GUI.
